message:
test(fcp-core): pin CapabilityId Display+FromStr+serde + IdValidationError 6-variant matrix (flywheel_connectors-p1xf4)

Bead asks for CapabilityToken Display+FromStr roundtrip + serde pinning.
CapabilityToken is a COSE_Sign1 binary blob with no Display/FromStr —
its meaningful round-trip is base64/hex, not text. The closest
text-form analogue with Display + FromStr + serde(try_from = "String")
is CapabilityId at capability.rs:124, the actual identifier naming a
capability inside a token.

Existing capability_id_display_roundtrip.rs covers happy-path + equivalent
constructors; this pin adds the residual rejection + serde-shape axes.

Coverage: validate_canonical_id 6-variant rejection matrix
(Empty / TooLong / NonAscii / UppercaseNotAllowed / InvalidStartChar /
InvalidChar) with byte-index pinning + invalid-start-char per separator,
boundary cases (128-byte max accepts; 129 rejects; digit start accepts),
IdValidationError distinct-Display sentinel, JSON scalar-string shape
via try_from/into adapters with deserialize-time rejection, CBOR Text
scalar shape via Value-inspection, JSON+CBOR decode equality, distinct-
canonical-ids hash + serialize distinctly (HashMap key safety),
cross-constructor equivalence (parse / try_from / new / from_static),
display roundtrip fixed-point on diverse canonical forms.

18 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-p1xf4 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test capability_token_display_roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
